markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and implementation for HockeyStack's engagement with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's AI-powered content generation platform (Atlas) uses custom artifacts to guide content creation, ensuring alignment with HockeyStack's voice and goals](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on 3-4 key clusters: go-to-market/account intelligence, marketing attribution, revenue operations, and potentially industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [GrowthX aims for higher content volume (5 blogs/week) compared to HockeyStack's current SEO agency (5/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [HockeyStack wants to balance SEO-driven content with more opinionated, unique perspectives in their articles](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

## Topics

### AI-Powered Content Generation Process

  - [GrowthX uses custom artifacts (Writing Guidelines, Audience Personas, Company Brief) to guide AI content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Atlas platform integrates SEMrush data, perplexity search, and custom outlines for comprehensive article generation](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Process includes human editing and fact-checking before client review](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Custom artifacts can be created for specific needs (e.g., regulatory compliance)](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [Focus on 3-4 key topic clusters to build authority and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

<!-- end list -->

1.  Go-to-market and account intelligence
2.  Marketing attribution (HockeyStack's established expertise)
3.  Revenue operations and integrating marketing data
4.  Potential vertical/industry-specific content (to be further discussed)

### SEO and AI Visibility Tactics

  - [Balancing traditional SEO with LLM (Large Language Model) discovery](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Utilizing HockeyStack's proprietary data and reports for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Considering listicle formats for solutions pages to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Using Scrunch platform to track AI visibility across various prompts and topics](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### Current Content Challenges

  - [HockeyStack's dissatisfaction with current SEO agency: slow content production, high-level/generic content, lack of brand voice alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Need for faster content production and more opinionated/unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Desire for tighter integration between GrowthX-produced content and HockeyStack's in-house content](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [GrowthX to set up Looker dashboards using Google Analytics and Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2394.0)
  - [Dashboards will track website performance, content performance, and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)
  - [Weekly screenshots of Scrunch AI visibility data to be shared with HockeyStack team](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Amulya to review artifacts in Notion and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [HockeyStack to provide Google Analytics and Search Console access to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2600.0)
  - [GrowthX to present blog ideas based on refined content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Select one blog post for calibration and feedback on voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with Amulya on pending tasks and reviews](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [Set up regular sharing of AI visibility data (Scrunch screenshots) with HockeyStack team](https://fathom.video/share/Tj4uoYQ_byYDd7sxCkNz3pYrJc79BDjd?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
